range_reconciliation_note: An earlier reference value was 2678 h; the unit-level CSV used for analysis gives 2818 h. The analysis reports the CSV-verified range.
interpretation_note: The observed 100 C range (720-2818 h) lies within the fitted single-population Weibull 2.5-97.5% interval; the spread is compatible with ordinary Weibull dispersion and does not identify the internal physical mechanism.
